pack.name: SSH
pack.description: Essential SSH, SCP, and key management commands
pack.author: sherpacli-community

commands.name: Connect to host
commands.description: Open SSH session on default port 22.
commands.use_case: Use for standard remote shell access.

commands.name: Connect using custom port
commands.description: Connect to SSH server on non-default port.
commands.use_case: Use when SSH daemon is not on port 22.

commands.name: Connect with identity file
commands.description: Connect using a PEM/private key file.
commands.use_case: Use for key-based auth on cloud hosts.

commands.name: Execute remote command
commands.description: Run one command remotely and exit.
commands.use_case: Use for quick remote checks without opening a shell.

commands.name: Copy local file to remote
commands.description: Upload a local file to remote server.
commands.use_case: Use to move files to servers quickly.

commands.name: Copy remote file to local
commands.description: Download a file from remote server.
commands.use_case: Use to retrieve logs, backups, or artifacts.

commands.name: Generate SSH key
commands.use_case: Use for secure key-based authentication setup.

commands.name: Install public key on server
commands.description: Copy local public key to remote authorized_keys.
commands.use_case: Use to enable passwordless SSH login.

commands.name: Local port forwarding
commands.description: Forward local port to remote target via SSH.
commands.use_case: Use to securely access private services through bastion host.
